The '''''Dromon''''' was a [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] frigate that attempted to aid its forces at the [[Battle of Science Station Youst]] during the [[Sepan campaign]]. It was destroyed while attacking the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']].

==Behind the scenes==
A [[Wikipedia:Dromon|dromon]] was a class of warship in the ancient [[Wikipedia:Byzantine navy|Byzantine navy]].

In the game [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] ''Dromon'' is a Ripoblus frigate, but ''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' erroneously classifies it as a [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] frigate.
